productDisplayName: John Players Men Solid Green T-Shirt
description: Composition Green T-shirt made of 100% cotton knit, has a round neck with a two-button chest placket, full sleeves with cuffs, and a patch pocket on the left chest with brand embroidery and a patch above Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton knit fabric and designed with innovative styling, this full sleeve T-shirt from john players offers exemplary comfort and a flattering silhouette, which is sure to elevate it into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
